programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Ducks face the Oilers in Game 2 of the West first round at Rogers Place. Edmonton won the opener 7-4 on Jan. 26, fueled by its power play. Connor McDavid leads the Oilers while Cutter Gauthier leads the Ducks. Anaheim looks to even the series.

programme.title: Live: NHL on TNT Postgame
programme.desc: Postgame analysis of NHL games.

programme.desc: Deangelo plays favorites by creating an inner circle of most liked employees, and the women notice it seems to be all guys.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Golden Knights face the Mammoth in Game 3 of the West first round at Delta Center. The series is tied after Utah won Game 2. Mark Stone scored early, but Dylan Guenther got the lead for Utah. Logan Cooley later pounced on a rebound for the win.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: NHL forward Wyatt Johnston and Howie Mandel set up NHL defenseman Lian Bichsel at a restaurant where a romantic proposal meltdown turns him into the unwitting villain.

programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff (Ben Affleck) is a mathematics savant with more affinity for numbers than people. Using a small-town CPA office as a cover, he makes his living as a freelance accountant for dangerous criminal organizations. With a Treasury agent (J.K. Simmons) hot on his heels, Christian takes on a state-of-the-art robotics company as a legitimate client. As Wolff gets closer to the truth about a discrepancy that involves millions of dollars, the body count starts to rise.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
